data.title: Phase III trial results of MET inhibition in NSCLC patients published in The Lancet. Confirms efficacy in patients with acquired MET amplification after prior EGFR-TKI treatment.
data.description: A groundbreaking Phase III trial has provided confirmation of the effectiveness of MET inhibition in individuals with advanced non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) who have acquired MET amplification following treatment with previous EGFR-TKI therapy. This study marks the first randomized trial of its kind and highlights the promising outcomes in this patient population. The results revealed a significant increase in survival rates among participants, with a notable reduction in tumor progression. This development signifies a major advancement in the treatment of NSCLC, with implications for improving outcomes for a substantial number of patients.

data.title: Seef Properties in Bahrain adopts Yardi's Real Estate Cloud Technology for operational efficiency and innovation.
data.description: A prominent real estate developer in Bahrain has prioritized proptech and digital transformation as key components of its operational strategy. Seef Properties, a top integrated real estate development and asset management company based in Manama, Bahrain, has actively embraced innovation to drive its business forward. This strategic approach aims to enhance efficiency and growth within the company. The initiative was announced on January 14, 2026.

data.title: Dogecoin and Shiba Inu continue to rise in 2026, but Pepe memecoin leads with an 18% gain, followed by Bonk with 14%.
data.description: Specialized cryptocurrencies known as memecoins experienced significant growth on Tuesday amid a general upturn in the cryptocurrency market. Since the start of the year, this Ethereum-based memecoin has seen an impressive 70% increase in value. data.title: Yiwu merchants, led by Huang Changchao, are taking the "China Model" of stationery industry global. #Yiwu #Stationery #GlobalExpansion
data.description: On January 13, 2026, it was reported that Yiwu merchants have been increasingly focused on expanding globally. Huang Changchao, the President of the Yiwu Stationery & Cultural Products Industry Association, was one of the early adopters of overseas expansion. Three years ago, he took the initiative to lead this movement. This highlights the growing interest in international markets among Yiwu merchants and demonstrates their proactive approach to tapping into global opportunities.

data.title: Leadshine made successful debut at CES 2026, entering US and European robotics supply chain, gaining global attention.
data.description: In Las Vegas from January 6th to 9th, 2026, Leadshine showcased its products at the Consumer Electronics Show (CES 2026). Positioned as a comprehensive provider of core components for humanoid robots, Leadshine attracted global interest in the North Hall during the event.

data.title: Trump threatens to jail Powell over Fed's HQ project; economist warns of hyperinflation fears as unprecedented move.
data.description: Economist Justin Wolfers criticized President Trump for threatening Federal Reserve Chair Powell with a "criminal indictment" over the central bank's renovation project. This move was deemed unprecedented and authoritarian, likened to tactics used by dictatorial regimes. Wolfers highlighted that such actions could lead to hyperinflation and negative outcomes. This is the first time in U.S. history a Fed Chair has faced jail threats from a president. The seriousness of the situation is compared to troubled countries like Argentina and Venezuela. Despite the severity, the market's response remains unclear.

data.title: Visionary Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: GV) issues correction on fiscal year 2025 annual report after U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission feedback.
data.description: On January 12th, 2026, Visionary Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: GV) released its fiscal year 2025 Annual Report, disclosing key financial figures and operational insights. The updated headline now aligns with statements from the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission to ensure accuracy in reporting. This revision clarifies the information previously shared by Visionary Holdings Inc., providing a comprehensive overview of their performance in the past fiscal year.
